Aasimar: Celestial Resistance: You have resistance to Necrotic and Radiant damage.
Healing Hands: As a Magic action, touch a creature and roll d4s equal to your Proficiency Bonus. The creature regains HP equal to the total. Use once per Long Rest.
Light Bearer: You know the Light cantrip. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it.
Dragonborn: Draconic Ancestry: Choose one damage type. You have resistance to that damage type.

Breath Weapon: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one attack with magical breath in a 15-ft. cone or a 30-ft. line that is 5 ft. wide. Each creature in the area makes a DEX save: DC = 8 + CON mod + PB. On a failure, it takes 1d10 damage of your chosen type, or half as much on a success.
You can use Breath Weapon a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus. Regain all uses on a Long Rest.
Dwarf: Dwarven Resilience: You have resistance to Poison damage and advantage on saves to avoid or end the Poisoned condition.
Dwarven Toughness: Your maximum HP increases by 1.
Stonecunning: As a bonus action, gain Tremorsense 60 ft. for 10 minutes. You must be on or touching stone. Uses equal your Proficiency Bonus. Regain all uses on a Long Rest.
Elf: Elven Lineage: Choose one Elf lineage.
Fey Ancestry: You have advantage on saves to avoid or end the Charmed condition.
Keen Senses: Gain proficiency in Insight, Perception, or Survival.
Gnome: Gnomish Cunning: You have advantage on INT, WIS, and CHA saving throws.
Gnomish Lineage: Choose one Gnome lineage.
Goliath: Giant Ancestry: Choose one Giant ancestry.
Powerful Build: You have advantage on ability checks to end the Grappled condition. You also count as one size larger for carrying capacity.
Halfling: Brave: You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Frightened condition.
Halfling Nimbleness: You can move through the space of any creature that is a size larger than you, but you can't stop in the same space.
Luck: When you roll a 1 on the d20 of a D20 Test, you can reroll the die, and you must use the new roll.
Naturally Stealthy: You can take the Hide action even when you are obscured only by a creature that is at least one size larger than you.
Human: Resourceful: Gain Heroic Inspiration whenever you finish a Long Rest.
Skillful: Gain proficiency in one skill.
Orc: Adrenaline Rush: You can Dash as a bonus action. When you do, gain temporary HP equal to your Proficiency Bonus. Uses equal your Proficiency Bonus. Regain all uses on a Short or Long Rest.
Relentless Endurance: When reduced to 0 HP but not killed outright, drop to 1 HP instead. Use once per Long Rest.
Tiefling: Fiendish Legacy: Choose one Tiefling legacy.
Otherworldly Presence: You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip.
